channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Agents 24/7 cost $12k/month. Here’s the bill
item.description: Cut AWS bills 64% for Nairobi SaaS agents — real latency, cost, and retry data from a live system. Learn what always-on vs on-demand really costs in 2026.

item.title: Handoff latency kills systems — 60% fix is free
item.description: Cut p95 latency 60% by merging agents and caching — real Node.js and Python case studies with Redis 7.2 and BullMQ 4.14

item.title: Agents 24/7 vs on-demand: $42k bill shock
item.description: Multiply that by four agents, and you’ve already burned $1,174 monthly before you’ve even processed a single request.

item.title: Optimise agent sync on 3G: gzip + CDN vs local cache
item.description: Cut p99 agent sync latency 37% with a local Go cache vs CDN — concrete benchmarks, cost numbers, and the exact TTL that worked in East Africa 2026.

item.title: Agent design after LLM-4: we broke 5 assumptions
item.description: LLM-4 agent latency fell 76% after we replaced prompt caching with stateful orchestration — PostgreSQL 16, Keyspaces, and Step Functions in 2026 costs.

item.title: LLM drift: the silent quality drop metrics miss
item.description: Cut silent LLM quality drops 90% with nightly prompt drift detection — embedding similarity, tokenizer hashes, and the 0.08 threshold that caught every regression in 18 months.

item.title: 8 ways we measure agent reliability in 2026
item.description: Measure agent reliability with 8 metrics that actually predict user trust — hallucination rates, consistency, recovery speed, and more. Benchmarks, code, and the one metric we ship first.

item.title: Pick the right AI model: fine-tune, router, or bigger
item.description: Cut AI costs 76% with a prompt router — fine-tune vs route vs bigger model decision matrix with code, numbers, and benchmarks for 2026.

item.title: Platform teams still build for 2024 in 2026 it's failing
item.description: Cut deployment latency 85% by dropping GitHub Actions for agent-first platforms. How most platform teams still enforce 2024 workflows in 2026 and why it’s failing their developers.

item.title: Audit trails: ImmutableDB vs DynamoDB Streams
item.description: Cut audit trail costs 35% with DynamoDB Streams — benchmark, code snippets, and the compliance mistake that cost $18k

item.title: Dumped 3 tools, kept Postgres 17
item.description: Cut API costs 60% by replacing Redis and TimescaleDB with PostgreSQL 17 extensions — real numbers, benchmarks, and the mistakes we made along the way.

item.title: Detect lazy agents without false alarms
item.description: Cut false alarms 60% by replacing similarity evaluators with outcome predictors — a 2026 field guide with benchmarks, YAML config, and the exact metric to track first.

item.title: A/B pricing tests that lifted ARR 18%
item.description: Lift ARR 18% with anchor pricing and tiered friction experiments — the exact code, metrics, and pitfalls most teams miss when optimizing pricing pages in 2026.

item.title: Survive network drops: agentic workflows that keep running
item.description: Cut approval workflow downtime 90% with durable command logs — works on $6 DigitalOcean droplets, survives 90-minute 3G drops, no Kafka or Step Functions needed.

item.title: Stick to boring stacks with AI services
item.description: Cut AI service costs 70% with boring stacks — PostgreSQL pgvector, Redis caching, and dedicated GPUs saved us $1.8k/month on a single feature

item.title: 15 agents blew up our logs: why we pinned models + logs
item.description: Cut log debugging 78% with structured logs + model pinning — exact schema IDs, pinned Docker tags, and the rollback mistake most teams skip.

item.title: Payments fail? How we fixed Flutterwave, Paystack, M-Pesa…
item.description: Reduce Flutterwave, Paystack, M-Pesa reconciliation failures by 99.8% — idempotency keys, schema validation, and reconciliation jobs that actually work in 2026

item.title: Expose AWS egress costs: what we tracked next
item.description: Cut AWS surprise egress bills 31% with per-service cost visibility — CloudWatch, CUR, and Flow Logs mapped to real prices in 2026.

item.title: Event sourcing works when LLMs write projections
item.description: Cut projection rebuild time from hours to minutes with LLM-generated event sourcing code — concrete benchmarks, cost savings, and the one metric to check today.

item.title: AI model poisoning: 3 real attacks on datasets
item.description: Cut AI poisoning incidents 100% with dataset hashes, SLSA 1.1, and Sigstore 0.10.0 — the real tools and metrics teams used in 2026.
